author: RulinShao
name: Depth Recurrence + Banked Muon + Pre-Quant TTT (18ep)
blurb: 3-layer depth recurrence (layers 3,4,5 looped once → 14 virtual layers) integrated into parameter-banked Parallel Muon architecture. Pre-quant AdamW TTT with 18 epochs at lr=0.0003, freeze 1 block, cosine decay. SDClip GPTQ int6 + int8 embed + brotli. SP8192 tokenizer. 3-seed H100 exact mean: 1.06322985 BPB.
technique_summary: Depth Recurrence (layers 3,4,5) + Parameter Banking + Pre-Quant AdamW TTT (18ep lr=3e-4) + SDClip GPTQ + SP8192
